scripts.prisma:generate:order: cd services/order-service && npx prisma generate && echo '{"name":"@prisma/order-client","main":"./index.js","types":"./index.d.ts"}' > node_modules/@prisma/order-client/package.json
scripts.prisma:generate:payment: cd services/payment-service && npx prisma generate && echo '{"name":"@prisma/payment-client","main":"./index.js","types":"./index.d.ts"}' > node_modules/@prisma/payment-client/package.json
scripts.prisma:generate: npm run prisma:generate:order && npm run prisma:generate:payment
scripts.postinstall: if [ -d services/order-service ]; then npm run prisma:generate:order; fi && if [ -d services/payment-service ]; then npm run prisma:generate:payment; fi
